[![\"\"](\"\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/01\/Organized-by.png\") | [![\"\"](\"http:\/\/2025.iccas.org\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/10\/2.-\ud68c\uc0ac\ub85c\uace0\uc601\ubb38-300x144.png\") **Purpose Recently, artificial intelligence (AI) has been widely applied to improve operational efficiency in various industrial fields. In line with this, ICROS and Koh Young ([https://kohyoung.com/kr), the world-leading SMT inspection solution provider, jointly host AI Challenge to encourage students to compete for an efficient decision-making problem in the manufacturing inspection process.

**Participants Graduate and undergraduate students interested in AI development for industrial data are eligible to participate in the competition. The maximum number of members per team is limited to 5.

**Registration 1\. Download and fill out the registration form:  [_Click & Download the form 2\. Send the form to [ _conference@icros.org and [ _sooheehan@postech.ac.kr .

**Main schedule * Registration opening: Aug. 11 – Sep. 12, 2025 * Competition: Sep. 15 – Oct. 10, 2025 * Award ceremony: Nov. 6, 2025 All winners must register for ICCAS 2025. Winners will also have the opportunity to present their algorithms in a special session and are required to open-source their solutions. The oral presentations of the 1st, 2nd and 3rd place winners will be recorded and uploaded to YouTube.​

Note: The competition schedule is subject to slight changes due to various circumstances.

**Prizes  * * 1st place: 5,000,000 KRW * 2nd place: 3,000,000 KRW * 3rd place: 1,000,000 KRW **Announcement  **Contact: If you have any questions, please send your inquiry to Prof. Soohee Han at [_sooheehan@postech.ac.kr by e-mail.

[![\"\"](\"http:\/\/2025.iccas.org\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/08\/3rd-AI-Competition-2025.08.05.bmp\")
